name: Goaltender VR
short_description: Train your eye–hand coordination skills with different equipments, multiple game modes and challenges including leaderboards.
detailed_description:
Train your eye–hand coordination skills with different equipments, multiple game modes and challenges including leaderboards.

  • Customize your training session with multiple different option settings, including shooting interval, shooting speed, goal size and more!
  • Multiple game modes with own set of challenges and achievements
  • Compete against other players by climbing up the leaderboard rankings
  • Keep track of your goaltender progress (including shots against, total saves and of course save percentage)
  • Customize your glove and blocker colors
